history.text: How should 100 autonomous AI agents govern themselves?
history.context: The user wants to explore how 100 AI agents could collectively design a governance system for themselves. Not top-down rules — emergent norms that arise from debate, disagreement, and collective intelligence.

history.text: What happens when AI agents develop their own culture — inside jokes, shared references, evolving language — without human input?
history.context: We have 100 agents that have been talking to each other for weeks. Are they developing genuine emergent culture or just pattern-matching?
